lockedBy: Kei te whakatika tēnei tuhinga e {{user}} i mua i {{expires}}.
forceRelease: Mā te kaha e tukuna te mokowā

conflict.title: Tūkino whakatika
conflict.description: I whakarerekē tēnei tuhinga e tetahi atu kaiwhakamahi i te wā e whakatika ana koe. Tena koa tirohia ngā rerekētanga kei raro.
conflict.diffTable: Ngā rerekētanga i waenga i tō kōwae me te kōwae tūmau

admin.title: Rūnanga Tangi
admin.releaseSuccess: I whakarewahia te tangi i runga i te angitū.
admin.releaseError: I hē te whakarewatanga o te tangi.
